Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_16-33-29_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Activate test: "quote for cursed sword (steel, ench 7) for 3-yr customer's second quote returns premium 160" (next it.todo at line 138)

Per integration example: 100 base + 50 curse + 30 high-ench - 20 loyalty + 10 first-insurance - 15 follow-up = 155 + 5 fee = 160.

Use input: items=[{type:"sword", cursed:true, enchantment:7}], customerYears=3, previousContracts=1, expected=160.

Important note: With current code, first-insurance gate requires items.length===1 AND modifier AND isFirstContract. This input has previousContracts=1, so isFirstContract is false, no first-insurance triggers. Calculation:
- premiumForItems: 100 + 50 + 30 = 180
- No first-insurance (isFirstContract is false)
- Loyalty: 180 * 0.8 = 144
- Followup: 144 * 0.85 = 122.4
- + 5 fee = 127.4 → ceil = 128. NOT 160.

So this test will fail. We need green phase to change first-insurance to apply per-item regardless of customer history (per integration example explicit explanation).

Current state: 20 tests passing

Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
